description: A new ad creative from an advertiser needs to be checked against technical and content policies before it can be used in campaigns.

nodes.task_description: Ingest the new ad creative file.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully ingests the video file.

nodes.task_description: Run an automated scan to check for technical compliance (e.g., bitrate, format, audio levels).

expected_outcome.expected: The scan passes with no technical issues.

nodes.task_description: Manually review the ad for compliance with content policies (e.g., no promotion of gambling or violence).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews the ad and confirms it complies with all content policies.

nodes.task_description: Approve the ad creative and make it available for campaigns.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent marks the creative as 'approved' in the ad management system.
